name: Noels
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter in a medium mixing bowl with an electric mixer on medium speed for 30 seconds.
2. Add brown sugar, baking soda, baking powder, and salt; beat until combined.
3. Add sour cream, egg, and vanilla extract; beat until well combined.
4. Beat in as much flour as you can. Stir in any remaining flour, dates, and walnuts.
5. Drop the batter by well-rounded teaspoons about 2 inches apart onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 400°F for 8 to 10 minutes or until light brown.
7. Cool on a wire rack.
8. Drizzle with Powdered Sugar Frosting.
Makes 36 cookies.
Powdered Sugar Icing: Stir together 1 1/2 cups powdered sugar and enough milk (1 to 2 tbsp.) to make a drizzling consistency.
